_comment: Single source of truth for the NGA rolling session cadence. Consumed by the 'NGA Session Cadence' weekly cloud routine (which git-clones this repo and reads docs/ops/cadence_config.json) and mirrored in Session_Cadence_Playbook.md. Canonical copy: nextgen-academy/docs/ops/ — keep the ~/Documents/NGA/06_operations/ copy byte-identical. Dates are ISO (America/New_York). August is ON HOLD — do not add Aug weekends until Sam unfreezes (see seasonHoldFrom).
_formatNote: v2 (2026-05-30): one 1-hour session per event day, $20/player, single rotating venue per weekend. Replaced the v1 afternoon Early/Late two-slot pattern. The $35 two-hour bundle was reverted (no adjacent slot to bundle).
_eventDayNote: Saturday-only. Each event weekend's session runs Saturday 10:00-11:00 at that weekend's rotation venue. eventWeekends still carry a sun date for reference but no Sunday session is scheduled.

venues.name: Sherwood HS
venues.address: 300 Olney-Sandy Spring Rd, Sandy Spring, MD 20860

_venueRotationNote: One venue per weekend, cycling WJHS -> GHS -> SHS. The per-weekend assignment is pinned in eventWeekends[].venue (source of truth); venueRotation just documents the order.
_timeSlotsNote: Single 1-hour morning session (10:00-11:00 ET). Chosen for summer-heat avoidance + simplicity. One session per day, no Early/Late split.
_newsletterNote: Thu 18:00 ET. Cadence blocks ride inside the approved 'From Coach Sam' newsletter draft block — no website code change.
_leadNote: 3-2-0 rolling. Relative to the event Saturday, the controlling newsletter is: poll ~T-17d, register ~T-10d, lastCall ~T-2d (the Thursday before the Saturday event).

pollForm._note: Updated 2026-05-30 to v2 format: venue question now lists all 3 venues (WJHS / Gaithersburg / Sherwood / Either works) and the Sat/Sun day question was removed (Saturday-only). url = public viewform; editUrl = Sam's edit link; responsesSheetUrl = vote tally Sheet (Sam reads manually in v1).

_holdNote: Event weekends on/after this date are frozen. The routine omits any poll/register/last-call block that would target a held weekend (same handling as a skip). Extend eventWeekends + push this date out when August is unfrozen.

skipWeekends.reason: July 4-11 skip window (whole weekend; confirm if Sun 7/12 should run)

eventWeekends._note: Pre-cadence: open registration compressed, no poll cycle.
Pre-cadence: open registration compressed, no poll cycle.
